transcript: Hey everybody, I just wanted to say thanks for helping get this place ready. Ta-da! Here, this lintel soup goes to table three. Got it! Please take a seat. Oh, but give it back at the end of your meal. May I recommend the linger chicken? Thank you. What's up, LJ? Your usual pregame special? You know it. Two double belchers, extra pickles, extra onion, triple hot sauce. thanks for for turning me on to this burg i think it's really taking my game up a notch i know right it's all about converting fire to field burger high five two cheeseburgers two fries and two Oh, not for me. I'll just have the cottage cheese and melon slices. Sue says I should stick to food that's a little easier to digest. This from the guy who cleaned out an entire Chinese buffet? I took it to him. Ah, what the heck? I'll have what he's having. And put chili on everything. Who stepped on a frog? Thanks for letting me check out the restaurant. Sure thing, hon. Ooh, a customer. Hey, why don't you take this one? Here you are, ma one cob salad hey what's the dealio I asked for extra bacon oh sorry my bad oh this blue cheese smells whack hey why is there so much bacon on this are you Are you kidding, dude? Fine! I'll fix it for you! But you know what? I got this one, honey. We'd love a table in the back or, know in the kitchen or the back works careful mr coconuts you've got a chip on your shoulder hey less jokes more salsa duck duck duck goose this goose came to play Ayo, Lincoln! Go, Wolf! I got it! Whoops! Oh, Lincoln! Go, Wolf! I got it! Whoops. Oh, my. Ghost. Ghost. Vampire. Oh, me? Wait, I want to... What in the name of the funny pages is going on here? Oh, hi, Mom's boss! There he is! Well, well, well. If it isn't the pumpkin eater. Celebrating your engagement, Roberto. My engagement? What? It's go time, Romeo. Mamma mia! The linguine dim sum! Hurry up with those kung pao anchovies! By my third note, I got up the nerve to ask him to meet me here. and my boldness paid off because here we are celebrating the 20th anniversary of that first date. Best day of my life, love. Aww. Oh, sorry, dude. No worries. What are you writing? It's supposed to be a song, but I'm wicked blocked. Maybe I can help. I've dabbled in music myself. Have a seat. You gonna finish that bra? It's all yours. So, what's going on? I really gotta kill it with this song. But everything I write is garbage. I actually tried to rhyme with YOLO. Oh. I know, right? Free pizza and root beers. Just my way of saying thanks for helping me get this job. Here's your pizza, guys. Hey, Chandler, may I invite you to have a slice? Thanks, dude. Aren't you forgetting something? some pepper flakes would be great So, what do you guys think I think it stinks that's the best part God with a hint of lobster paste. Ugh! Ah! Look! It's going upstream to spawn. Yeah, on your car. Oh, no! That's Pantila! Monkey Pigeon's Pizza Palooza Paradise! Starring your favorite video games, your favorite toppings, and your favorite hits! Ooh, girlooza paradise you'll lose your mind i can do this it's all about balance this is like a boss i'm eating a sweet tater no no no Shoo, Bly! Shoo! Never mind, hon. We can grab some fish. No, no, no. Shoo, fly, shoo. Never mind, hon. We can grab some fish sticks at the school, Wilbur.
